title: mfa — feature keys
description: Tenant-facing feature keys exposed in the /auth/me bootstrap manifest. Downstream SPAs / clients read these to render or hide MFA UI. Distinct from the entitlement keys in entitlements.json (which gate the underlying capability at the HTTP layer); these features gate UI-visible chunks of the MFA panel.

features.description: Base MFA capability. Always on if the caller has been assigned MFA enrolment access.
Enrol a time-based one-time-password via Google Authenticator / Authy / 1Password / iCloud Keychain / etc.
Enrol a passkey (Face ID / Touch ID / Windows Hello / phone-synced passkey) or a hardware key (YubiKey / Titan Security Key). Free tier gated off — team+ can enrol WebAuthn.
Register more than one WebAuthn credential (backup key, phone + laptop). Free tier caps at one credential.
One-time-use fallback codes when the primary MFA method is unavailable. Ten codes per generation event; regenerable.
Require a fresh MFA challenge before password changes / MFA disabling / credential deletion / recovery-code regeneration. Enterprise-only because of the friction cost.
Sends email + platform-security notification when the caller's Identity sees rapid failed MFA challenges from novel IPs.
